artifact_summary: Title page for Appendix A of the HFC AWTP Master Plan Improvements: SCADA Design Criteria document, displaying the Fiber Network Map section with Hazen and Reliable Tampa Partners logos.
artifact_key_elements: Hazen and Reliable Tampa Partners logos
HFC AWTP Master Plan Improvements document
artifact_blurb: This image serves as the official title page for Appendix A of the 'HFC AWTP Master Plan Improvements: SCADA Design Criteria' technical memorandum. It visually identifies the specific content as the 'Fiber Network Map' and prominently features the corporate branding of Hazen and Reliable Tampa Partners.
